caption: Device Power State Activity
description: Device Power State Activity events report activities related to power state changes of a system.
name: device_power_state_activity

1.caption: Power On
1.description: A power-on activity was reported for the system.

2.caption: Power Off
2.description: A power-off activity was reported for the system. For a graceful shutdown, the actor may be specified.

3.caption: Sleep
3.description: A sleep activity was reported for the system.

4.caption: Hibernate
4.description: A hibernate activity was reported for the system.

5.caption: Reboot
5.description: A reboot activity was reported for the system.

6.caption: Wake
6.description: A wake acitvity was reported for the system.

actor.description: The actor that performed the activity on the device object.

device.description: The host or device that changed power state.
